title: Xi Jinping to make state visit to Russia on March 20-22 — Kremlin
description: The Kremlin press service specified that "a number of important bilateral documents will be signed" during the Chinese leader’s visit
snippet: MOSCOW, March 17. /TASS/. Chinese President Xi Jinping will make a state visit to Russia from March 20-22 at the invitation of President Vladimir Putin, the Kre...
